[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101011 4
1 0111010 4
2 0011111 5
3 1110100 4
4 1001101 4
5 0111011 5
6 0000000 a
7 0111001 4

01 10 1110110 5
12 21 1100100 3
23 32 0010001 2
34 43 0100101 3
45 54 1101011 5
56 65 0111001 4 match 7
67 76 1110110 5
70 07 0000010 1

13 31 1110101 5
24 42 0110100 3
35 53 1001110 4
46 64 1010010 3

60 06 1110100 4 match 3
71 17 1110100 4 match 3

03 30 0000011 2

47 74 0100100 2
50 05 1001101 4 match 4
61 16 0000010 1
72 27 0010000 1

37 73 0000001 1
